headline: Sony Plans First Dollar-Bond Sale in Nearly Three Decades
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Sony Group Corp. was still marketing the original PlayStation when it last tapped the US investment-grade bond market. Almost three decades later, it’s readying a comeback.
